image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Extra CO2 doesn’t just warm the air—it changes our oceans.
Context visual: As CO2 dissolves in seawater, it forms carbonic acid, altering pH levels.
Evidence visual: This impacts carbonate ions, essential for shell-building creatures like corals and mollusks.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But it’s not all grim—marine life is remarkably resilient.
Payoff visual: Research is ongoing, and scientists are finding ways to help ecosystems adapt.
Cta visual: Stay curious and explore how we can protect our oceans. Like and follow for more science insights!
